name: Hoyoung
title: The Newcomer
mechanicsDetail: Assassin Mechanics: Crit, Shards, Poison, Rush, Stealth.

startingAbility.name: Killshot
startingAbility.rawText: Fire an arrow at the farthest enemy. It deals 250 (+250% Attack, +250% Magic) damage and gains 25 (+100% Crit) additional Crit.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Conduit
rankBSpecializations.rawText: On kill, permanently gain 2 Mana Regen and Stealth for 4 seconds. At start of combat, other Assassins and Mystics gain all Mana Regen gained from this ability. Backup.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Hunter
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Killshot gains 50 (+50 per rank) Crit the first 1 (+1 per rank) times it is cast each combat. On kill, gain 1 Shard for each hex from the enemy.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Sniper
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Always choose to target the furthest enemy. Auto attacks gain 10 (+10 per rank) Attack and 3 (+3 per rank) Crit for each hex from the enemy.
